source.title: NPNF-211. Sulpitius Severus, Vincent of Lerins, John Cassian

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: On reading your letters, my feelings were, in many ways, deeply moved, and I could not refrain from tears.

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: For I both wept for joy because I could perceive from the very language of your letters, that you were living according to the precepts of the Lord God, and out of my exceeding desire after you, I could not help lamenting that, without any fault on my part, I was parted from you; and I would have felt this still more strongly had you not sent me a letter.

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: Should I not, then, enjoy the company of such a sister?

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: But I call your salvation to witness, that I have very often wished to come to you, but have up till now been prevented, through the opposition of him who is accustomed to hinder us.

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: For, in my eager desire, I was both urgent to satisfy my wishes by seeing you; and we seemed, if we should meet, likely to accomplish more effectually the work of the Lord, since by comforting one another we should live with the heavy load of this world trodden under our feet.

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: But I do not now fix the day or time of visiting you, because, as often as I have done so, I have not been able to fulfil my purpose.

verses.book: Letter I. A Letter of the Holy Presbyter Severus to His Sister Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment.
verses.text: I shall wait on the will of the Lord, and hope that, by my supplications and your prayers, he may bring it about that we reap some advantage from our perseverance.
